entities.summary: Embedding table sharded across GPUs by vocabulary range

detail.name: VocabParallelEmbedding
detail.description: Each GPU holds embeddings for a slice of the vocabulary. Tokens outside local range return zeros, then all-reduce.
detail.why: Vocabulary embeddings are huge (vocab_size × hidden_dim) — must shard across GPUs

teaches.explain: Divide vocab across GPUs. Each handles tokens in its range. All-reduce combines results. Distributes memory evenly.
teaches.rationale: Used here because: Vocabulary embeddings are huge (vocab_size × hidden_dim) — must shard across GPUs

teaches.explain: Lookup table mapping discrete token IDs to dense vectors. Foundation of all NLP — converts symbolic input to continuous representation.
teaches.rationale: Used here because: Vocabulary embeddings are huge (vocab_size × hidden_dim) — must shard across GPUs

entities.summary: Compute local vocabulary range for this GPU shard

detail.name: __init__
detail.description: Calculates start/end token indices this device is responsible for. Allocates only local portion.

teaches.explain: Divide ID space into contiguous ranges per device. Device k handles IDs [k*chunk, (k+1)*chunk). Simple and cache-friendly.
teaches.rationale: Calculates start/end token indices this device is responsible for

entities.summary: Load embedding weights for this device vocabulary slice

detail.name: weight_loader
detail.description: Extracts rows from checkpoint corresponding to this GPU token range.

teaches.explain: Only load the rows this device needs from checkpoint. Reduces peak memory during loading by num_devices×.
teaches.rationale: Extracts rows from checkpoint corresponding to this GPU token range

entities.summary: Lookup embeddings with masked out-of-range tokens

detail.name: forward
detail.description: Masks tokens outside local range to 0, does embedding lookup, then all-reduce across devices.

teaches.explain: Set out-of-range indices to 0 before lookup (returns zero vector). After all-reduce, each token gets its correct embedding from the owning device.
teaches.rationale: Masks tokens outside local range to 0, does embedding lookup, then all-reduce across devices

entities.summary: Output projection (logits) sharded to match embedding parallelism

detail.name: ParallelLMHead
detail.description: Projects hidden states to vocabulary logits. Sharded identically to embedding for weight tying.

teaches.explain: Share same weight between input embedding and output projection. Halves parameters for vocabulary. Common in LLMs.
teaches.rationale: Projects hidden states to vocabulary logits

entities.summary: Initialize output head with optional weight tying to embedding

detail.name: __init__
detail.description: Can reuse embedding weights directly or create separate sharded weight matrix.

teaches.explain: Multiple layers reference same nn.Parameter. Saves memory. Gradients summed during backprop.
teaches.rationale: Can reuse embedding weights directly or create separate sharded weight matrix

entities.summary: Compute logits via matmul with (possibly shared) embedding weights

detail.name: forward
detail.description: output = hidden @ embedding_weight.T — produces raw vocabulary scores.

teaches.explain: Linear projection from hidden_dim to vocab_size. Higher logit = higher probability token after softmax.
